name: apex
description: APEX — Autonomous Planning and Execution eXchange: a dual-mode orchestration framework for OpenCode CLI
author: APEX Contributors

scripts.setup-skills: npx skills add vercel-labs/agent-browser@agent-browser -g -y && npx skills add mattpocock/skills@tdd -g -y && npx skills add mattpocock/skills@to-prd -g -y && npx skills add anthropics/skills@skill-creator -g -y
scripts.setup-companion-skills: npx skills add trailofbits/skills@ask-questions-if-underspecified -g -y && npx skills add openai/skills@security-threat-model -g -y && npx skills add trailofbits/skills@property-based-testing -g -y && npx skills add trailofbits/skills@differential-review -g -y
